{{Infobox character
| name = Wei Patriarch
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The first [[Wei Patriarch]]'s ascension to [[Jade]] drew snowfoxes from across the [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Wei Patriarch]] has never imagined the power [[Yerin]] possesses.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wei Patriarch]] oversees the stages of the trial/confrontation.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wei Patriarch]] shouts orders.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The Wei Patriarch arrived outside the circle, the First Elder at his side. “Stage two!” he shouted.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
